info.name: Exposed Git Repository
info.description: A publicly accessible .git/config file was found, which can leak source code and repository history.

info.name: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal
info.description: Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49 is vulnerable to path traversal and remote code execution via CVE-2021-41773.

info.name: Missing Security Headers
info.description: The web server does not set Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, or Strict-Transport-Security headers.

info.name: Directory Listing Enabled
info.description: Directory indexing is enabled, exposing the contents of a web directory.

info.name: Apache Tomcat Manager Default Credentials
info.description: The Tomcat Manager application is accessible with default tomcat:tomcat credentials, allowing WAR deployment and remote code execution.

info.name: Exposed .env File
info.description: An application .env file is publicly accessible and may leak database credentials and secret keys.

info.name: phpMyAdmin Panel Exposed
info.description: A phpMyAdmin login panel is publicly exposed.

info.name: Unauthenticated Jenkins Dashboard
info.description: A Jenkins dashboard is accessible without authentication, exposing build jobs and enabling potential script console access.
